function.name: max5data
xferinfo_cb
function.parameter_list: (void *clientp, curl_off_t dltotal, curl_off_t dlnow, curl_off_t ultotal, curl_off_t ulnow)

unit.comment: /* Provide a string that is 2 + 1 + 2 + 1 + 2 = 8 letters long (plus the zero byte) */

function.name: time2str

unit.comment: /* |DL% UL% Dled Uled Xfers Live Total Current Left Speed | 6 -- 9.9G 0 2 2 0:00:40 0:00:02 0:00:37 4087M */

function.name: progress_meter
progress_finalize
